name: north-star
description: Design skills toolkit for Claude Code. Formalize and maintain a system's conceptual target design by altitude (NEED → CONCEPT → SOLUTION) as living design-as-context, written as structured prose with Mermaid diagrams. Skills: designing-by-altitude (SOLUTION layer — North Star + subsystem designs) and modeling-the-domain (CONCEPT layer — ubiquitous language + conceptual domain model).
